Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: vessels for serving drinks [300198808], vessels for serving and consuming food [300198938], containers for serving and consuming food [300198760], culinary containers [300197577], containers by function or context [300197200], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: bowls (vessels) [300203596], vessels (containers) [300193015], containers by form [300194507], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Large bowls, usually made of silver, ceramic, or glass, in which a beverage, such as punch or lemonade, is prepared and served. They are frequently accompanied by a ladle and sometimes a set of punch cups.

Grandes bols, generalmente de plata, cerámica o vidrio, en los cuales una bebida, como ponche o limonada, se prepara y sirve. Están frecuentemente provistos de un cucharón y algunas veces de un juego de copas de ponche.
Grote kommen, meestal van zilver, keramiek of glas, waarin een drank zoals punch of limonade wordt bereid of geserveerd. Vaak horen er een opscheplepel en een stel punchkoppen bij.
準備及供應潘趣酒或檸檬水等飲料的大碗，多為銀、陶瓷或玻璃材質。潘趣酒碗常附酒杓，有時也會附上一組潘趣酒杯。

Große Schüssel, in der Regel aus Silber, Keramik oder Glas gefertigt, in der ein Getränk wie Punsch oder Limonade hergestellt und serviert wurde. Sie wird meistens von einer Kelle und manchmal von einem Set von Punschgläsern begleitet.
